goal: Track Ember monthly coal generation across the target markets in one consistent dashboard view starting in January 2025.

normalizedRecordSchema.observedAt: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp for the month-end observation
normalizedRecordSchema.fetchedAt: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp for the Ember ingestion run
normalizedRecordSchema.coalGenerationMw: number | null (same numeric value retained for backward compatibility)
normalizedRecordSchema.notes: Monthly Ember series used for cross-market comparison
